questionHtml: Find the probability it will rain in each of the three hours Paula is working outside.
markschemeHtml:
Note: Accept probabilities written as percentages throughout.

 

0.78×0.72×0.48        (M1)

= 0.270 (0.269568)        A1

 

[2 marks]
